name: Don J. Grundmann
party: No Qualified Party Preference (Constitution Party of California / Christian Nationalist Party)
background: Constitution Party of California, state affiliate Christian Nationalist Party. Statement contains extreme antisemitic and conspiracy content.
statement: Statement contains extreme antisemitic conspiracy theories and is not reproduced here in full. Candidate affiliates with Constitution Party of California and Christian Nationalist Party. Advocates nationalizing the Federal Reserve and printing interest-free United States Notes.

positions.economy: Nationalize the Federal Reserve; print interest-free United States Notes

note: Statement contains antisemitic conspiracy content and has been summarized rather than reproduced.
